target.profile_basis: RCH ts2 crate-scoped dispatch profile ranked vmap_eigh/batched_matrix_3x3 as the top fj-dispatch row.

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-dispatch-next-profile-rch-target rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

next_deeper_primitive.direction: Stop iterating fj-dispatch Eigh micro-bypasses; attack a different profile-backed primitive such as dense f64 cotangent accumulation in fj-ad if its current in-progress owner can be confirmed, or re-profile fj-dispatch for a non-Eigh structural target.
next_deeper_primitive.target_ratio: >=1.25x same-worker midpoint with conservative interval not worse than baseline
